headline: Billionaire Investor Reshuffles Utility Bets, Buys Constellation Energy And Trims PG&E
summary: Hedge fund billionaire Daniel Loeb added 475,000 shares of Constellation Energy and trimmed PG&E stake in Q4 FY25.

headline: Jefferies downgrades PG&E as wildfire liability reform prospects dim
summary: Investing.com -- Jefferies downgraded PG&E Corporation to Hold from Buy, citing weakening prospects for meaningful wildfire liability reform and a stock price that already reflects optimistic expectations.

headline: Jefferies Downgrades PG&E to Hold, Lowers Price Target to $19
summary: Jefferies  analyst Julien Dumoulin-Smith   downgrades PG&E (NYSE:PCG) from Buy to Hold and lowers the price target from $20 to $19.
